---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or change
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Who hits it today and how often?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see built, at a high level.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you didn't pick them.

## Affected contracts / surfaces

Which parts of the system this touches (e.g. `ServiceEscrow`, `AgentDID`, SDK, docs).

## Breaking change?

- [ ] Yes — this changes a deployed interface and requires a migration plan
- [ ] No — backward compatible

## Additional context

Links, prior art, related issues.
